I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 35): DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup
The `DescriptionList` at line 35 contains `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` children directly. The conformance rule says `DescriptionList` must contain `DescriptionListGroup`. I need to wrap the children of `DescriptionList` in a `DescriptionListGroup`. I also need to add `DescriptionListGroup` to the imports from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2 (Line 30): PageSection variant "light" → "default"
`PageSectionVariants.light` is no longer valid. The value `"light"` maps to `"default"` in PF6 (light background = default). I should replace `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` with `variant="default"`. Since `PageSectionVariants` will no longer be used anywhere in the file after this change, I should also remove it from the imports.

Let me apply both fixes:

arguments.after:
<DescriptionList className="pf-v6-c-description-list">
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              bodyContent={t(
                'Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services. ',
              )}
              onEditClick={() =>
                createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                  <LabelsModal
                    isOpen={isOpen}
                    obj={vm}
                    onClose={onClose}
                    onLabelsSubmit={(labels) => updateLabels(vm, labels)}
                  />
                ))
              }
              breadcrumb="VirtualMachine.metadata.labels"
              data-test-id={`${getName(vm)}-labels`}
              descriptionData={<MetadataTabLabels labels={vm?.metadata?.labels} />}
              descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="labels">{t('Labels')}</SearchItem>}
              editOnTitleJustify
              isEdit
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.LABELS}
              showEditOnTitle
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              bodyContent={t(
                'Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata. They are not queryable and should be preserved when modifying objects. ',
              )}
              onEditClick={() =>
                createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                  <AnnotationsModal
                    isOpen={isOpen}
                    obj={vm}
                    onClose={onClose}
                    onSubmit={(annotations) => updateAnnotation(vm, annotations)}
                  />
                ))
              }
              breadcrumb="VirtualMachine.metadata.annotations"
              descriptionData={<MetadataTabAnnotations annotations={vm?.metadata?.annotations} />}
              descriptionHeader={<SearchItem id="metadata">{t('Annotations')}</SearchItem>}
              isEdit
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.ANNOTATIONS}
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
        </DescriptionList>

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct. Both fixes have been applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup (Line 35)
**Applied.** Wrapped each `<VirtualMachineDescriptionItem>` inside `<DescriptionList>` with its own `<DescriptionListGroup>`. Added `DescriptionListGroup` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import. Each description item gets its own group, which is the standard PF6 pattern for `DescriptionList` content.

### Fix 2 — PageSection variant "light" → "default" (Line 30)
**Applied.** Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` (the PF6 equivalent of the removed `"light"` value). Removed the now-unused `PageSectionVariants` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — DescriptionList requires DescriptionListGroup (Line 35)
